name: Chris Connor
abstract: Mary Jean Loutsenhizer, known professionally as Chris Connor (November 8, 1927 – August 29, 2009), was an American jazz singer.

about_quotes.speaker: Joel Dorn
about_quotes.evidence: He had John Coltrane and the Modern Jazz Quartet and Ornette Coleman and Herbie Mann and Fathead and Hank Crawford and Ray Charles and Chris Connor and Charles Mingus. That was his time.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joel Dorn interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2007

about_quotes.speaker: Rebecca Kilgore
about_quotes.evidence: And then other singers that I got into are ... Chris Connor ...
about_quotes.doc_title: Rebecca Kilgore interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 13, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: touches of it in June Christie and Chris Connor, some of those.
